description: Basic details about a live broadcast including its title, description, and scheduled start and end times.

publishedAt.description: The date and time that the broadcast was added to YouTube's live broadcast schedule.

channelId.description: The ID of the channel to which this broadcast is affiliated.

title.description: The broadcast's title. The title is a required field when inserting a broadcast.

description.example: A sample description for this resource.

thumbnails.description: A map of thumbnail images associated with the broadcast.

scheduledStartTime.description: The date and time that the broadcast is scheduled to begin.

scheduledEndTime.description: The date and time that the broadcast is scheduled to end.

actualStartTime.description: The date and time that the broadcast actually started.

actualEndTime.description: The date and time that the broadcast actually ended.

liveChatId.description: The live chat ID associated with the broadcast.

isDefaultBroadcast.description: Indicates whether this broadcast is the default broadcast.

title: LiveBroadcastSnippet
